transcript: Speaker A: I am flying to Miami. One luggage. I am flying to... No, one suitcase... Speaker B: First time flying solo in English? Speaker A: Is it that obvious? I understand everything, I just freeze. Speaker B: My daughter was the same. She practices on Loora, it's an AI you just talk to. Like doing the whole check-in before you get there. Speaker A: An AI in English? Speaker B: 10 minutes a day. She booked our hotel in Miami herself last month. Speaker A: Okay, show me. I've got fifteen people ahead of me anyway. Speaker C: What are you doing? Speaker A: I am working. I have many work today. Speaker C: Do you mean: 'I have a lot of work today'? Speaker A: Yes, I have a lot of work today. And my brain not working. Speaker C: Do you mean: 'my brain isn't working'? Speaker A: Yes, I have a lot of work and my brain isn't working! Speaker C: That's perfect! Well done, Maria! Speaker A: I want to speak in English everyday but lesson are expensive! Speaker C: Why don't you speak to an AI tutor? Speaker A: I'm not sure about an AI tutor. I want someone who can help correct my mistakes. Speaker C: Like I did! My name is Loora and I am an AI tutor! Nice to meet you, Maria! Speaker A: You're an AI tutor? What? No way! Speaker C: Download the Loora app and talk to me everyday and I'll help correct your mistakes! Speaker A: Amazing. I'll add it to my daily routine today!
on_screen_text: I am flying to Miami. One luggage. I am flying to... No, one suitcase... First time flying solo in English? Is it that obvious? I understand everything, I just freeze. My daughter was the same. She practices on Loora, it's an AI you just talk to. Like doing the whole check-in before you get there. An AI in English? She booked our hotel in Miami herself last month. Okay, show me. I've got fifteen people ahead of me anyway. What are you doing? I am working. I have many work today. Do you mean: 'I have a lot of work today'? Yes, I have a lot of work today and my brain not working. Do you mean: 'my brain isn't working'? Yes, I have a lot of work and my brain isn't working! That's perfect! Well done, Maria! I want to speak in English everyday but lesson are expensive! Why don't you speak to an AI tutor? I'm not sure about an AI tutor. I want someone who can help correct my mistakes. Like I did! My name is Loora and I am an AI tutor! Nice to meet you, Maria! You're an AI tutor? What? No way! Download the Loora app and talk to me everyday and I'll help correct your mistakes! Amazing. I'll add it to my daily routine today!
summary: A woman struggling to speak English at an airport is introduced to Loora, an AI tutor app. The ad demonstrates the AI correcting her grammar in real-time on a split screen, prompting her to download the app.
